data.description:
## SC1 Gap — Remediation Task

SC1 of epic 3aaa-0238 requires .github/workflows/ci.yml to have:
- A structured pipeline with needs: dependencies (lint → tests → llm-review)
- A conditional llm-review job (needs: tests)

Currently ci.yml runs all jobs in parallel with no needs: chain and no llm-review job.
The llm-review job exists only in plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml (the consuming-project template).

## Implementation

1. Add needs: [shellcheck, lint-python] to hook-tests and script-tests jobs
2. Add llm-review job with needs: [hook-tests, script-tests], adapting from ci-dso-staged.yml:
   - uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@<pinned SHA>
   - reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from secrets
   - reads model from vars.DSO_LLM_LIGHT_MODEL (default tier for plugin self-review)
   - timeout-minutes: 10

## Acceptance Criteria
- grep -q 'llm-review' .github/workflows/ci.yml
- grep -q 'needs:' .github/workflows/ci.yml
- ShellCheck passes on ci.yml
- Structural tests pass
data.title: [CI]: Add llm-review job and needs: chain to .github/workflows/ci.yml
